name: Trovis Agent Management
description: Automatic agent monitoring and management. Captures telemetry, reads agent identity, and sends everything to your Trovis dashboard.
author: Trovis

endpoint.description: Trovis endpoint URL. Required — the plugin is inert until this is set.

agentName.description: Agent name shown in Trovis dashboard

apiKey.description: Your Trovis API key from oversee.dev

enabled.description: Set to false to load the plugin without emitting telemetry. Default: true.

readUserData.description: Include USER.md and MEMORY.md in registration data. These files may contain personal information. Default: false.

captureOutputs.description: Capture message content and tool outputs for richer dashboard insights. Default: false.
